entity.summary: Decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol using proactive market-maker and proprietary AMM designs across Base and Monad deployments.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates Lunarbase deployments and AMM surfaces under one exchange entity. Current first-party application and independent protocol data report non-zero TVL, fees, revenue, and recent DEX volume. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is inferred.

evidence.title: Lunarbase official exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application endpoint identifies the Lunarbase exchange and remains reachable.

evidence.title: Lunarbase protocol profile and trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol data identifies Lunarbase as a DEX operating across Base and Monad and reports current non-zero liquidity, fees, revenue, and recent trading volume.
